visualization.title: Distribution of Academic Titles among Professors

resultRaw.sql: SELECT COALESCE(academic_title, '(Unknown)') AS academic_title, COUNT(*) AS professor_count FROM public.professors GROUP BY COALESCE(academic_title, '(Unknown)') ORDER BY professor_count DESC, academic_title ASC;

issues: The visualization does not explicitly specify sort to match the SQL ORDER BY professor_count DESC, academic_title ASC — the displayed bar order may not match the intended descending count order.

Minor UX note (non-blocking): with many distinct academic_title values you may want horizontal bars or larger width/rotated labels to avoid overlap; this is a presentation preference, not a correctness issue.

visualization.title: Distribution of Academic Titles among Professors

result.sql: SELECT COALESCE(academic_title, '(Unknown)') AS academic_title, COUNT(*) AS professor_count FROM public.professors GROUP BY COALESCE(academic_title, '(Unknown)') ORDER BY professor_count DESC, academic_title ASC;

issues: The visualization does not explicitly specify sort to match the SQL ORDER BY professor_count DESC, academic_title ASC — the displayed bar order may not match the intended descending count order.

Minor UX note (non-blocking): with many distinct academic_title values you may want horizontal bars or larger width/rotated labels to avoid overlap; this is a presentation preference, not a correctness issue.
